title: Logics for Artificial Intelligence

prerequisites.text: Admission into the Master's degree specialising in Computer Science or Artificial Intelligence, or permission from the course convener. Familiarity with basic discrete mathematics is highly recommended.

outline: This course will introduce students to logics used in the area of Knowledge Representation — a subarea of Artificial Intelligence. Topics covered include: The Description Logic ALC; Reasoning in Description Logics with Tableaux Algorithms; Reasoning in the EL family of Description Logics; and Query Answering.
